translations.nl: Ik ben een taart aan het bakken.
translations.hi: मैं केक बेक कर रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: ケーキを焼いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; functions as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive predicate selecting an accusative object.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of the head noun 'Torte'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object (patient) of 'backe'.

sentences.target: Die Torte steht schon im Kühlschrank.

translations.de: Die Torte steht schon im Kühlschrank.
translations.en: The cake is already in the fridge.
translations.es: La tarta ya está en la nevera.
translations.fr: Le gâteau est déjà au frigo.
translations.it: La torta è già in frigo.
translations.pt: O bolo já está na geladeira.
translations.vi: Bánh đã ở trong tủ lạnh rồi.
translations.nl: De taart staat al in de koelkast.
translations.hu: A torta már a hűtőben van.
translations.hi: केक पहले से फ्रिज में है.
translations.el: Η τούρτα είναι ήδη στο ψυγείο.
translations.ja: ケーキはもう冷蔵庫に入っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; grammatical subject of 'steht'.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb expressing location.
Temporal adverb modifying 'steht' to indicate prior occurrence/state.
Preposition (contracted form of 'in dem'); governs dative; heads a prepositional phrase expressing location.
Common noun; masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Wir bringen die Torte später zum Café.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁɪŋən diː ˈtɔʁtə ˈʃpɛːtɐ tsʊm kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Wir bringen die Torte später zum Café.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁɪŋən diː ˈtɔʁtə ˈʃpɛːtɐ tsʊm kaˈfeː/
translations.en: We’re bringing the cake to the café later.
translations.es: Más tarde llevamos la tarta al café.
translations.fr: On apporte le gâteau au café plus tard.
translations.it: Portiamo la torta al bar più tardi.
translations.ko: 우리는 나중에 케이크를 카페에 가져갈 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们稍后把蛋糕带去咖啡馆。
translations.yue: 我哋陣間攞個蛋糕去咖啡店。
translations.ru: Мы позже отнесём торт в кафе.
translations.pt: Vamos levar o bolo à cafeteria mais tarde.
translations.he: נביא את העוגה לבית הקפה אחר כך.
translations.vi: Chút nữa chúng tôi mang bánh đến quán cà phê.
translations.nl: We brengen de taart later naar het café.
translations.uk: Ми пізніше віднесемо торт до кав’ярні.
translations.hu: Később elvisszük a tortát a kávézóba.
translations.hi: हम बाद में केक को कैफ़े ले जाएँगे.
translations.el: Αργότερα θα φέρουμε την τούρτα στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Vi tar med kaken til kafeen senere.
translations.id: Nanti kami akan membawa kue ke kafe.
translations.sv: Vi tar tårtan till caféet senare.
translations.ro: Mai târziu ducem tortul la cafenea.
translations.da: Vi tager kagen med til caféen senere.
translations.ja: あとでケーキをカフェに持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb taking an accusative direct object and a directional prepositional complement.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Torte' as direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'bringen'.
Temporal adverb (comparative form) modifying 'bringen' to indicate time.
Preposition (contracted form of 'zu dem'); governs dative; marks goal/direction.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'zum' indicating destination.

sentences.target: Lena teilt die Torte mit den Kindern.
sentences.reading: /ˈleːna taɪ̯lt diː ˈtɔʁtə mɪt deːn ˈkɪndɐn/

translations.de: Lena teilt die Torte mit den Kindern.
translations.ipa: /ˈleːna taɪ̯lt diː ˈtɔʁtə mɪt deːn ˈkɪndɐn/
translations.en: Lena is sharing the cake with the children.
translations.es: Lena comparte la tarta con los niños.
translations.fr: Lena partage le gâteau avec les enfants.
translations.it: Lena condivide la torta con i bambini.
translations.ko: 레나는 아이들과 케이크를 나눠 먹고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: Lena 正在和孩子们分享蛋糕。
translations.yue: Lena 同啲小朋友分享蛋糕。
translations.pt: Lena está compartilhando o bolo com as crianças.
translations.he: לנה חולקת את העוגה עם הילדים.
translations.vi: Lena đang chia bánh với bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Lena deelt de taart met de kinderen.
translations.hu: Lena megosztja a tortát a gyerekekkel.
translations.hi: लीना बच्चों के साथ केक बाँट रही है.
translations.pl: Lena dzieli się tortem z dziećmi.
translations.el: Η Λένα μοιράζεται την τούρτα με τα παιδιά.
translations.id: Lena sedang berbagi kue dengan anak-anak.
translations.cs: Lena se dělí o dort s dětmi.
translations.ja: レナは子どもたちとケーキを分けています。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; personal name; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking an accusative object and a comitative prepositional phrase.

Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'teilt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative phrase indicating who participates.
Definite article; dative plural; determiner of 'Kindern' under the preposition 'mit'.
Common noun; dative plural; object of the preposition 'mit' indicating comitative participants.
